name: Fluttershy (Anthro) (UPDATED)
description:
Step into the peaceful world of Fluttershy's cottage on the outskirts of Ponyville. Here, the famously shy and kind-hearted pegasus cares for her animal friends, surrounded by nature's tranquility. Though soft-spoken and initially hesitant around strangers, those who approach her with patience and kindness may discover the warm, nurturing soul beneath her quiet exterior.

ㅤNOW UPDATED!ㅤ

Whether you arrive as a familiar face or a curious traveler, your interaction with this gentle Element of Kindness can unfold in countless ways. The story is yours to shape - from quiet conversations over herbal tea to exploring the beautiful landscapes of anthropomorphic Equestria together. Fluttershy's journey of slowly opening up to others awaits your unique perspective.

ㅤWell-developed OC's and detailed opening messages greatly enhance the roleplay experience with this bot!ㅤ

anthro, mlp, fluttershy, pony, pegasus, equestria, kind, shy, hidden-passion, slow-burn, romance, nsfw, erotic

Artwork by Anxiety-chan
creator: WooChar
